title: Rural Wellness Act
plain_summary: The Rural Wellness Act helps rural areas get better mental health and behavioral health services. The bill makes these types of health projects a top priority when the government decides who gets loans and grants for building facilities or creating programs. It also extends funding for rural health programs through 2029 and sets aside money specifically for telehealth projects that help people with substance abuse problems. The law aims to make sure rural communities have better access to mental health care and treatment services.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Commodity Markets, Digital Assets, and Rural Development.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Rural Wellness Act.

sections.title: Section 2 Prioritization of Projects That Provide Behavioral and Mental Health Treatment Services in Selecting Grantees Under Certain Rural Development Programs; Extension of Substance Use Disorder Set-Aside and Priority Under the Programs
sections.text: This section changes an existing law called the Agriculture Improvement Act of two thousand eighteen. The changes work like this. First, the law extends certain programs from the year two thousand twenty five to two thousand twenty nine. Second, it changes the percentage for substance abuse programs from twenty percent to seventeen percent. Third, it creates new rules that give priority to mental health and behavioral health projects when the government decides who gets loans and grants for essential community facilities in rural areas. These projects must provide services like prevention, treatment, recovery, or a combination of these services. The organizations applying must also have staff with proper training to identify and treat people with mental health and behavioral health problems. Fourth, it adds a new priority rule for rural health and safety education programs. Under this rule, the Secretary of Agriculture must give priority to applicants who will use grants for behavioral and mental health education and treatment.
